summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of CSV Import feature in Lead Finder dashboard. All 34 tests PASSED. Feature is fully functional: CSV upload, filtering businesses without websites, table display, status management, localStorage persistence, WhatsApp integration, search/filter, and delete operations.
passed_tests: TEST 1: PASS - Login page loaded correctly
TEST 2: PASS - Password entered successfully
TEST 3: PASS - Login button clicked and authenticated
TEST 4: PASS - CSV Import tab visible in navigation after login
TEST 5: PASS - CSV Import title found: 'CSV Import'
TEST 6: PASS - CSV Import button found: 'CSV IMPORTEREN'
TEST 7: PASS - CSV file input accepts .csv files only (accept='.csv')
TEST 8.0-8.3: PASS - All 4 stat cards present (Totaal, Zonder Website, Benaderd, Gereageerd)
TEST 9: PASS - CSV file uploaded successfully
TEST 10: PASS - Correctly filtered to 7 leads (removed 3 with websites from 10 total)
TEST 11: PASS - CSV leads table displayed
TEST 12: PASS - Table headers correct: Bedrijfsnaam, Categorie, Plaats, Telefoon, Status, WhatsApp
TEST 13: PASS - Search input found with data-testid
TEST 14: PASS - Status filter dropdown found with data-testid
TEST 15: PASS - Status dropdown shows current value 'nieuw'
TEST 16: PASS - Status dropdown works with Benaderd option
TEST 17: PASS - Benaderd count updated to 1 in stats
TEST 18: PASS - WhatsApp URL has correct 31 prefix
TEST 19: PASS - WhatsApp URL has pre-filled message
TEST 20: PASS - Phone number correctly formatted (no leading 0 after 31)
TEST 21: PASS - Search by name works correctly (1 result for 'Kapsalon')
TEST 22: PASS - Search by plaats works correctly (4 results for 'Almelo')
TEST 23: PASS - Status filter works correctly (1 result for 'benaderd')
TEST 24: PASS - Delete individual lead works (count reduced from 7 to 6)
TEST 25: PASS - Leads data persisted in localStorage after page refresh
TEST 26: PASS - Status changes persisted in localStorage after refresh
TEST 27: PASS - Individual lead status persisted correctly after refresh
TEST 28: PASS - Clear all button removes all imported leads
TEST 29: PASS - Table hidden when no leads (empty state shown)
TEST 30: PASS - Plaats correctly extracted from address (Almelo, Hengelo, Enschede)
TEST 31.nieuw: PASS - Status 'nieuw' works
TEST 31.benaderd: PASS - Status 'benaderd' works
TEST 31.gereageerd: PASS - Status 'gereageerd' works
TEST 31.overgeslagen: PASS - Status 'overgeslagen' works
TEST 32.1-3: PASS - Phone numbers correctly formatted (31 prefix, no leading 0, no spaces/dashes)
TEST 33: PASS - WhatsApp message is in Dutch
TEST 34: PASS - WhatsApp message contains business name
critical_code_review_comments: CSV Import feature well implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Phone formatting function correctly removes leading 0 and adds 31 prefix
extractCity function properly extracts city from address (second part after comma)
localStorage persistence implemented correctly with 'csv_imported_leads' key
CSV parsing with PapaParse correctly filters out businesses WITH websites
All 4 status options (Nieuw, Benaderd, Gereageerd, Overgeslagen) work correctly
WhatsApp URL generation includes Dutch pre-filled message with business name
Search filters by both name and plaats (city) as expected
Stats cards update correctly when status changes
seed_data_creation: Used test CSV at /tmp/test_leads.csv with 10 rows (3 with websites, 7 without)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32: Tested CSV Import feature in Lead Finder dashboard (/leadfinder). All features working correctly: 1) CSV Import tab visible after login with password 'yrvante2025', 2) CSV file upload accepts .csv only, 3) CSV parsing filters out businesses WITH websites (10 rows -> 7 imported), 4) Table displays correct columns (Bedrijfsnaam, Categorie, Plaats, Telefoon, Status, WhatsApp), 5) Plaats extracted from address (second part after comma), 6) All 4 status options work (Nieuw/Benaderd/Gereageerd/Overgeslagen), 7) Status persists in localStorage after refresh, 8) WhatsApp button generates correct wa.me link with 31 prefix and Dutch pre-filled message containing business name, 9) Phone numbers auto-formatted (remove leading 0, add 31, remove spaces/dashes), 10) Stats cards show correct counts, 11) Search filters by name or plaats, 12) Status filter dropdown works, 13) Delete individual lead works, 14) Clear all button removes all leads. Key data-testids: csv-import-button, csv-file-input, csv-leads-table, csv-search-input, csv-status-filter, csv-stat-0 through csv-stat-3, csv-whatsapp-{id}, csv-status-select-{id}, csv-delete-{id}, csv-clear-all. localStorage key: 'csv_imported_leads'.
